---
title: "LLM Systems"
listing:
  contents: notes/llm-systems
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, depth, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    depth: "Depth"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

Inference, post-training, and scaling — how LLMs actually run and get better in production.
